CustomField.description: Formula field that evaluates to true when the End Date is blank or in the future and the Start Date does not exceed the End Date. Read-only; cannot be edited directly.
CustomField.formula: OR( ISBLANK( EndDate__c ), AND( EndDate__c >= TODAY(), NOT( StartDate__c > EndDate__c ) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Shows whether this schedule is currently active based on the End Date. A schedule with no End Date or a future End Date is considered active.
CustomField.label: Active
